title: Sustainable and Green AI

modules.title: AI's Environmental Impact
modules.sub: Examining the hidden ecological costs of modern AI systems
modules.description: Learners audit the environmental toll of training and deploying large-scale AI, from water usage to carbon emissions. They analyze real-world case studies to quantify how data centres and compute infrastructure contribute to environmental strain. By the end, professionals can articulate the full scope of AI's ecological footprint to stakeholders.

modules.title: Energy-Efficient AI Models
modules.sub: Designing and selecting models that consume less power
modules.description: Learners evaluate techniques such as model pruning, quantization, and knowledge distillation that reduce energy demands without sacrificing meaningful performance. They compare architectural choices and hardware configurations to determine which combinations yield the best efficiency trade-offs. Professionals leave with a decision framework for choosing or building leaner AI models.

modules.title: Carbon Footprint Measurement
modules.sub: Quantifying and reporting emissions from AI workloads
modules.description: Learners apply established tools and methodologies—such as ML CO₂ Impact calculators and cloud provider emissions dashboards—to measure the carbon output of specific AI projects. They practise translating raw energy data into standardised emissions metrics suitable for sustainability reports and regulatory disclosures. The module results in a completed carbon accounting template learners can reuse on the job.

modules.title: Sustainable Development Practices
modules.sub: Embedding green principles across the full AI development lifecycle
modules.description: Learners map sustainability checkpoints onto each phase of an AI project, from data collection and preprocessing through training, evaluation, and deployment. They draft a green AI policy for a simulated organisation, balancing performance targets with energy and emissions constraints. Professionals finish with an actionable playbook for integrating sustainable practices into existing development workflows.

synopsis: Learn about AI's environmental costs and energy consumption. Discover approaches to developing more sustainable and environmentally friendly AI systems.
